'''radhutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enate|enate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-dh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enate|enate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| radhutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rædhitith|rædhitith]] || [[word:rædhitij|rædhitij]] || [[word:rædhitish|rædhitish]] || [[word:rædhiti|rædhiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:radhudhututh|radhudhututh]] || [[word:radhudhutuj|radhudhutuj]] || [[word:radhudhutush|radhudhutush]] || [[word:radhudhutu|radhudhutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:radhututh|radhututh]] || [[word:radhutuj|radhutuj]] || [[word:radhutush|radhutush]] || [[word:radhutu|radhutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:radhuftuth|radhuftuth]] || [[word:radhuftuj|radhuftuj]] || [[word:radhuftush|radhuftush]] || [[word:radhuftuf|radhuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:radhututhu|radhututhu]] || [[word:radhutuju|radhutuju]] || [[word:radhutushu|radhutushu]] || [[word:radhutuku|radhutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:radhututh|radhututh]] || [[word:radhutuj|radhutuj]] || [[word:radhutush|radhutush]] || [[word:radhutu|radhutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:radhututhul|radhututhul]] || [[word:radhutujul|radhutujul]] || [[word:radhutushul|radhutushul]] || [[word:radhutukul|radhutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:radhututhuthu|radhututhuthu]] || [[word:radhutujuju|radhutujuju]] || [[word:radhutushushu|radhutushushu]] || [[word:radhutuku|radhutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:radhututhun|radhututhun]] || [[word:radhutujun|radhutujun]] || [[word:radhutushun|radhutushun]] || [[word:radhutukun|radhutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:radhututhuoro|radhututhuoro]] || [[word:radhutujuoro|radhutujuoro]] || [[word:radhutushuoro|radhutushuoro]] || [[word:radhutukuoro|radhutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
